products.name: FEST®
products.descriptor: Quasi-solid-state lithium-metal battery platform for EVs, drones, and defense

evidence.snippet:
### FEST®
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20632%20731'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
FEST® combines a lithium-metal anode, quasi-solid electrolyte technology, and an high-capacity cathode.
FEST®’s proprietary cell design combines performance and safety advantages of solid-state electrolytes with the manufacturability of conventional lithium-ion batteries.

Applications Include
Electric vehicles, aviation/drone, power tools, and marine vehicles.

**IRVINE, Calif. and BOSTON, Mass., \[February 5, 2026\]** –Karma Automotive Inc (“Karma Automotive), America’s only full-line ultra-luxury automotive manufacturer, and Factorial Inc. (“Factorial”), a U.S.-based leader in solid-state battery technology, today announced the launch of the first solid-state battery production program in the United States for passenger vehicles.

products.name: Solstice™
products.descriptor: All-solid-state sulfide electrolyte battery with dry-coating manufacturing process

evidence.snippet:
##### Solstice™
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20632%20731'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
Solstice™ leverages a sulfide-based all-solid-state electrolyte material, and can maintain operating temperature over 90°C.
Solstice™ utilizes a novel dry coating process, reducing operating costs, energy consumption, and environmental impact.

### Solstice™
All-Solid-State Battery
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20428%20200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2032%2032'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
Material
Zero liquid, sulfide-based all-solid-state electrolyte material for high thermal stability and safety.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2032%2032'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
Manufacturing
Manufactured through novel dry coating process for cost and environmental benefits.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2032%2032'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
Applications Include
Electric vehicles, consumer electronics, and energy storage systems.

products.name: Gammatron™
products.descriptor: AI/ML battery digital twin software for accelerating R&D and cell development

evidence.snippet:
### Gammatron™
AI/ Machine Learning Platform
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20428%20200'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2032%2032'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
Software
Battery digital twin software to enhance battery development throughput.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2032%2032'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
AI Innovation
Accelerate R&D with ML- assisted development and minimal physical resources.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2032%2032'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
Applications Include
Electrolyte development, predictive cell health modeling, fast charge optimization, BMS and more.

products.name: 100Ah Lithium-metal Solid-State Battery
products.descriptor: 100 Ah lithium-metal solid-state cell with UN 38.3 transport certification

evidence.snippet: Factorial Earns UN 38.3 Certification to ship 100Ah Lithium-metal Solid-State Battery
Factorial Energy nabs UN certification to ship 100 Amp-hour solid-state batteries for EVs

unresolved_questions: The 100Ah Lithium-metal Solid-State Battery press release (resource-0008) rendered only the headline and navigation — the full article body was not captured, so cell-level specs (voltage, form factor) could not be confirmed from corpus text.
Gammatron™ is categorized as test_and_measurement (battery digital twin/R&D software); no further corpus detail distinguishes whether it is sold standalone or bundled.
133 pages were skipped/failed in the mirror; additional SKUs or sub-variants of FEST®/Solstice™ may exist on those uncrawled pages.

fetch_requests.reason: Skipped press release about drone/robotics expansion with IQT; would clarify FEST® drone-specific readiness and any defense/NDAA compliance language for the prioritized products.
Skipped press release confirming A-sample shipments of 100Ah battery to automotive partners; would confirm production readiness and any compliance claims for the 100Ah SKU.
